---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Kllama
title: "[Feature]: "
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem Statement

What user problem, teaching need, or workflow gap does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Scope and Impact

Note whether this affects setup, documentation, tests, UI behavior, or local Ollama workflows.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or references if helpful.
